\tzpentry{ID3881}{Mode Frequency Functional}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3881 introduces Mode Frequency Functional as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} S(\omega) = \left|\int_0^T e^{i\omega t} \sum_{i=1}^{N_{\text{sensors}}} w_i(\mathbf{r}_i) u(\mathbf{r}_i, t) dt\right|^2 \end{equation}
